response.overview: The great fallacy is that the game is first and last about winning. It is nothing of the kind. The game is about glory, it is about doing things in style and with a flourish, about going out and beating the other lot, not waiting for them to die of boredom. - Danny Blanchflower This famous quote from the captain of the great Tottenham Hotspur double-winning side tells you everything you need to know about this great club and why it is known throughout the world for serving up football for connoisseurs. Some of the greatest players to grace the English game have worn the famous white shirt including Ramsey, Blanchflower, Mackay, Greaves, Hoddle, Ardiles, Gascoigne, Lineker, Klinsmann and Ginola ensuring a history rich in drama and sheer quality. This remarkable DVD commemorates 125 glorious years of Tottenham Hotspur Football Club
response.title: Spurs at 125
